title: Adapter Origin
description: A mythic species that always had to give up on something to achieve its goals, they adapted and through evolution they managed to overcome their weakness by choosing them.
body:
**Adapter** ***V1.1*** **(Always Improve)**

Made by: Amaranth_Red 

**Description:  A mythic species that always had to give up on something to achieve its goals, they adapted and through evolution they managed to overcome their weakness by choosing them.** 

**Passive Adaptation:** You can adapt to a specific damage source after taking damage, you will keep the adaptation for 1 minute and will be able to adapt again after 2 minutes. (Won't work on melee attacks) 

**Self Adaptation:** You can choose to make a attribute 50% weaker in order to make another one 50% stronger by pressing primary. 

**Lacking:** You will always have to lose 50% of one of your attributes.
